title: Treatment of Chagas disease (American trypanosomiasis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of Chagas disease (American trypanosomiasis)
Learn how Chagas disease is diagnosed and treated.
- How is Chagas disease diagnosed?
- How is Chagas disease treated?

## How is Chagas disease diagnosed?
Talk to a health care provider as soon as possible if you:
- feel sick in the weeks after being bitten
Your health care provider will likely:
- examine your symptoms
- determine if you were potentially exposed to infected triatomine bugs by asking about your: travel history activities accommodations
- request laboratory testing, if necessary

## How is Chagas disease treated?
A health care provider can recommend or prescribe certain medications to treat Chagas disease.
If left untreated, late-stage medical problems caused by the disease cannot be fully cured. However, certain medications can help with managing some of the symptoms.
